calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment-Unlimited Civil Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Oct-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant IBEAT, Inc., a corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Jonathan Neil & Associates, Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defendant IBEAT, Inc., a corporation.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Money Due for Goods Sold and Delivered and/or Services Rendered Pursuant to Written Agreement was filed on June 19, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant IBEAT, Inc., a corporation, occurred on July 3, 2019 and was effectuated on July 15, 2019.
Default as to defendant IBEAT, Inc., a corporation, was entered on August 21, 2019.
Assignment of Claim Form from Assignor to plaintiff Jonathan Neil & Associates, Inc., a corporation, was filed on September 16, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 16, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 26, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jonathan Neil & Associates, Inc., a corporation, and against the defaulted defendant IBEAT, Inc., a corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $43,588.14.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,154.74.
Attorney Fees - $1,875.00.
Costs - $529.35.

Total - $55,147.23.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
